title: Workhorse Introduces the W56 Extended Wheelbase Version
text: Workhorse Group Inc. unveiled its latest innovation: the W56 with a 208-inch extended wheelbase designed to accommodate a 22-foot step van body offering 1,200 cubic feet of cargo capacity. The extended wheelbase model incorporates over 100 refinements compared to its predecessor. Improvements include enhanced efficiency, easier upfitting, improved service access, and additional charge port location options. The vehicle maintains impressive specifications with payload capacity of approximately 10,000 pounds and range of up to 150 miles with zero-emission delivery capability. Standard production begins in Q3 2024 at Workhorse's Union City, Indiana facility. Initial customer deliveries are targeted for Q4 2024. The extended version was developed following customer demand from fleet operators.
